Class Player

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.Player
public class Player extends Object
Represents a Player in the game. Manages player's stats, cards in hand, heroes on the board, objectives, and specific boss buffs.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name)
      Constructs a new Player with default setup.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the player.

  • Method Details

    • drawRandomCard

      public void drawRandomCard()
      Draws a random card from the main deck and adds it to the player's hand. Triggers boss buff effects (Yeti, Murk Wolf, Red Buff) if applicable.

    • isWinningByClasses

      public boolean isWinningByClasses()
      Checks if the player has met the winning condition for the "Party Path" (All Classes).
      Returns:
      true if the player has 5 heroes of different classes and none match the Leader's class.

    • isWinningByObjectives

      public boolean isWinningByObjectives()
      Checks if the player has won by collecting 3 Objectives.
      Returns:
      true if player owns 3 or more objectives.

    • isWinning

      public boolean isWinning()
      Checks if the player has won the game via any condition.
      Returns:
      true if the player wins.

    • increaseActionPoint

      public void increaseActionPoint(int amount)

      public void decreaseActionPoint(int amount)
